overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a video game, featuring a narrow dirt trail winding through tall trees and thick underbrush with atmospheric low-light conditions.

fallen tree trunk or branch lying parallel to the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. The path is illuminated by a flashlight beam, revealing tall trees and thick underbrush on both sides. The environment remains consistently dark and isolated throughout the clip, with the trail winding slightly as the viewer progresses deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dense, nocturnal forest as the camera pushes deeper into an isolated wilderness. It begins by advancing steadily along a narrow dirt trail, where a single flashlight beam cuts through the oppressive darkness to reveal towering trees. As the camera progresses, the light flickers across thick underbrush that crowds the edges of the path, heightening the sense of confinement. The scene then shifts as the trail begins to wind slightly, drawing the viewer further away from the starting point and deeper into the shadows of the woods.
